center.name: 北卡罗来纳州
center.summary: 北卡罗来纳州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括蓝翅鸭、北美黑鸭、Royal tern，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also breeds in the southeast from southeastern Brazil south to Chubut Province in Argentina. The wintering range in the east is from North Carolina south to Panama and the Guianas and throughout the Caribbean

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The American black duck is endemic to eastern North America. In Canada, the range extends from northeastern Saskatchewan to Newfoundland and Labrador. In the United States, it is found in northern Illinois, Michigan, New Jersey, Ohio, Connecticut, Vermont, South Dakota, central West Virginia, Maine and on the Atlantic coast to North Carolina.{{Cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=nTM3AQAAMAAJ&pg=PA83|title=Cape Cod National Seashore (N.S.), Hunting Program: Environmental Impact Statement|last=U.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Some populations of blue-winged teals nest along the Atlantic Coast from New Brunswick to Pea Island, North Carolina. They migrate in flocks to winter in to the south of its breeding range
